results.title: NC Rejects PDP’s Backdoor Appointment Charge
results.description: Kashmir, Observer, Jammu, Srinagar, Latest Kashmir News, Kashmir News, Kashmir Latest News The Jammu and Kashmir government on Sunday strongly rejected the People's Democratic Party's allegations of backdoor appointments through outsourcing, asserting that all engagements have been made transparently and in accordance with an outsourcing policy framed during the PDP-BJP government. The post NC Rejects PDP’s Backdoor Appointment Charge appeared first on Kashmir Observer .

results.title: Strawberry Moon 2026: How to Watch Full Moon? Check Date, Time, When to Watch, Lunar Energy, Why is it called Strawberry Moon & All You Need to Know
results.description: The nickname of the Moon originated with Indigenous North American peoples, including the Algonquian, Ojibwe, Dakota, and Lakota nations. They tracked seasonal changes by naming each full moon after natural milestones in their environment. The post Strawberry Moon 2026: How to Watch Full Moon? Check Date, Time, When to Watch, Lunar Energy, Why is it called Strawberry Moon & All You Need to Know appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.title: [Photos] Al-Abbas’s (p) Holy Shrine provided services to pilgrims of Samarra on Ashura
results.description: Shafaqna India: The Al-Abbas (AS) Holy Shrine has counted the services it provided to the pilgrims of the shrine of the two Imams (AS) in the city of Samarra, as part of its special plan to commemorate the Ziyarat Ashura. Sources: Alkafeel www.shafaqna.com

results.title: WATCH: Abhishek Sharma Fan Gets His Autograph On Her Arm To Get It Tattooed Ahead Of India Vs Ireland 2nd T20I In Belfast
results.description: Abhishek happily agreed and signed her arm with a marker before the fan left to get the signature inked as a tattoo. The moment was captured on video and quickly went viral on social media, with many fans reacting to the level of admiration shown for the Indian cricketer.

results.title: "Trans Femicide State of Emergency in Chicago" [semi-satire]
results.description: Alarmed by the recent murder of a transgender woman, Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson (D) has redeclared what he calls "a trans femicide state of emergency. Too many transgender Chicagoans don't feel safe in spaces where they should feel safe and welcome. This declaration renews a state of emergency first declared in 2024. It is shameful that I have to reiterate this, but the killing must stop." Critics question the Mayor's focus on such a small fraction of the city's homicides. In the last decade 14 transgenders have been murdered. During this same period more than 5,000 non-transgenders have been murdered....

results.title: Eugenio Chacarra Takes Commanding Lead at Open d'Italia
results.description: Eugenio Chacarra has taken a commanding lead at the Open d'Italia, showcasing remarkable skill with a six-under 65. As he aims for his second title of the season, the competition remains fierce with Joaquin Niemann and Matt Wallace closely trailing. With changes to the final round schedule due to weather forecasts, the excitement builds as Chacarra prepares to defend his lead. Discover the details of this thrilling tournament and the players vying for victory.

results.title: Race to Develop Next-Generation Weight-Loss Pills Intensifies
results.description: Shafaqna Health: The future of weight loss treatment is looking to get easier to swallow. Several research teams and pharmaceutical companies are developing promising GLP-1-based drugs that come in a pill rather than an injection. Just this month alone, two separate teams published Phase II trial data on their oral GLP-1 candidates. These drugs, called aleniglipron [...]

results.title: Insurance Firm Replaces Physical Vehicle Checks With Digital Inspection Tool
results.description: AXA Mansard Insurance Plc has replaced physical vehicle assessments for many motor insurance policies with a digital inspection solution developed in partnership with insurtech firm Curacel. The new tool enables customers to complete required vehicle inspections remotely by submitting photographs of their vehicles through their smartphones, eliminating the need for physical inspections in many cases. results.title: People under 50 are ‘ageing faster’ than previous generations, study finds
results.description: Shafaqna Health: As cancer rates continue to climb among people under 50, new research suggests ‘accelerated ageing’ could play a part. Amidst a worrying rise in cancer among younger people, new research has revealed that under-50s are ageing faster than previous generations. Those born between 1965 and 1974 display higher biological age — wear and tear [...]

results.title: Africatown Diaspora Festival celebrates African and Caribbean cultures in Southwest Philadelphia
results.description: Music, food and cultural pride filled Woodland Avenue on Sunday as the inaugural Africatown Diaspora Festival brought together African, Caribbean and African American communities to celebrate their shared heritage in Southwest Philadelphia.
